headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -70.0)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 119% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 136 quotes including 118 at strong intensity - people are expressing intense anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 56.5 sits in the middle of its 70-day range, representing typical elevated levels rather than extreme peaks.

• Frustrations surged dramatically from yesterday's 7.1 while optimism dropped further into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
